title: Dogfood Pass 0004 Adversarial Proof-Packet Pressure Test

claims.text: Pass 0004 recorded MATCH or contract-read receipts for Index, Gather, Forum, Crucible, Telos freshness, and the Telos loop ledger.
claims.falsification: the pass 0004 ledger lacks one of the six tool-surface receipts or records a non-MATCH/non-contract status as MATCH

claims.text: Pass 0004 recorded a Forum adversarial submit failure caused by invalid JSON from the configured executor while Forum ledger chain and deep verification still succeeded.
claims.falsification: the pass 0004 ledger does not record the Forum submit failure or does not record chain=true and deep=true

claims.text: Gather pass 0004 web intake gathered 6 sources, kept 5, dropped 1, and recorded digest seal 293d0769cf92bf4cf0f3bece93f6825e581fde5eb960d6b97029bb4189d7d895.
claims.falsification: the pass 0004 ledger records different Gather counts or a different digest seal

claims.text: The pass 0004 ResearchClaim artifact contains at least 12 claims and every claim has claim, evidence_url, confidence, verification_status, and notes fields.
claims.falsification: research-claims-pass-0004.json has fewer than 12 claims or any claim lacks a required field

claims.text: The pass 0004 adversarial steelman covers 8 wedges and each wedge includes a strongest objection, fatal-risk test, evidence that would change the strategy, immediate countermeasure, and verdict.
claims.falsification: the steelman artifact covers fewer than 8 wedges or lacks any required section for a wedge

claims.text: Pass 0004 corrected the pass 0003 next-pass queue row-count line from stale 41-row phrasing to 42-row phrasing.
claims.falsification: pass-0003-ledger.md still contains the stale 41-row phrasing

claims.text: Pass 0004 promotes zero natural-law discoveries; all outputs remain strategy, evidence, or verification artifacts.
claims.falsification: any pass 0004 artifact labels a natural law, theorem, medical result, finance result, safety result, or physical discovery as promoted
